columns.extraction_plan: In the table titled "Baseline characteristics of the overall and ADT with docetaxel populations" (Table 1), under the "Overall population (n=1172)" section, locate the column "SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy; n=583)". In the row "Age, years", for "Median", the value is "67 (61-72)".

In the table titled "Baseline characteristics of the overall and ADT with docetaxel populations" (Table 1), under the "Overall population (n=1172)" section, locate the column "SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy; n=589)". In the row "Age, years", for "Median", the value is "66 (59-72)".
